title: The Duke’s Musketeers
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on the duke’s musketeers within the The Guardians of Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Claw City Zoro's Group!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AYAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's a flood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But there's sharks! Freaking Sharks! Why!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What are you doing all the way up there? A

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're already plenty safe up here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Salt Water?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Could it be... the elephant was bathing itself a short while ago?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Both the city and the forest appear to have adapted to this level of water.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I see... what with the amount of water that just fell, it definitely makes sense!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Meaning that this rain is a daily oc- currency.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This stuff falls every day!? Who could ever get used to that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Let's just find the others and get the hell off this island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmm!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oi, look, there's luffy! Inside the city!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That Nami dog-woman and the jumping rabbit from earlier are with him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: poor luffy... they've duped him and they're taking him to their base...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Gya AsAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What is it now, USOPP!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She just took a bite outta luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What!? So I guess they really are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The water level falls pretty quickly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: kyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WAAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He should be here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm telling you, he's not!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If you don't bring him forward, I'm gonna race this country to the ground!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I have no idea what you're talking about!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I really have no clue! What can I say that will make you believe me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's that guy's name again? You said it earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The one that destroyed this country?

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Jack. His obituary showed up in the paper the other day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He attacked the 4 ships that were escorting Doflamingo,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: and even managed to sink 2, but they got him in the end.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What!? So He was on Dressrossa too!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's the kind of lunatic crazy enough...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to attack a ship that had an Admiral and the former fleet Admiral on board.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The obituary didn't say anything about his death being completely confirmed, so chances are he's probably still alive.

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: We will never forgive Jack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We should be there soon.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: This mist's Super thick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So are zero and the others gonna be where we're going?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's the plan... I gave them specific directions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: on how to get to the fortress...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Chambres

summary: The Duke’s Musketeers: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
